metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 77.jpg in Documents > Task 77 folder on Photos app. Turn down the brightness to -1.
metadata.context: The default brightness setting of The Eiffel Tower photo is too high

l3.rationale: Move the pointer within the File Explorer home window before navigating.

l4.rationale: Use File Explorer to move into Documents, open the Task 77 folder, and open Task 77.jpg.

l5.rationale: The opening list-item navigation steps are consistent with moving through Documents to reach the Task 77 folder in Photos.

l3.rationale: Open the pinned Documents item to enter the Documents folder.

l4.rationale: Use File Explorer to move into Documents, open the Task 77 folder, and open Task 77.jpg.

l5.rationale: The opening list-item navigation steps are consistent with moving through Documents to reach the Task 77 folder in Photos.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor over the Documents navigation item area.

l4.rationale: Use File Explorer to move into Documents, open the Task 77 folder, and open Task 77.jpg.

l5.rationale: The opening list-item navigation steps are consistent with moving through Documents to reach the Task 77 folder in Photos.

l3.rationale: Select the Task 77 item in the Documents file list.

l4.rationale: Use File Explorer to move into Documents, open the Task 77 folder, and open Task 77.jpg.

l5.rationale: The opening list-item navigation steps are consistent with moving through Documents to reach the Task 77 folder in Photos.

l3.rationale: Open the selected Task 77 folder/item from the file list.

l5.rationale: The opening list-item navigation steps are consistent with moving through Documents to reach the Task 77 folder in Photos.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor over the popup window that appears for opening the file.

l4.rationale: Work through the Open With flow to choose Photos and confirm opening the image in that application.

l5.rationale: The window switches and open/select actions indicate loading the chosen image into the Photos viewer and confirming it opened correctly.

l3.rationale: Activate the "Choose another app" option in the popup.

l4.rationale: Work through the Open With flow to choose Photos and confirm opening the image in that application.

l5.rationale: The window switches and open/select actions indicate loading the chosen image into the Photos viewer and confirming it opened correctly.

l4.rationale: Work through the Open With flow to choose Photos and confirm opening the image in that application.

l5.rationale: The window switches and open/select actions indicate loading the chosen image into the Photos viewer and confirming it opened correctly.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor back over the Task 77 file item in Explorer.

l5.rationale: The window switches and open/select actions indicate loading the chosen image into the Photos viewer and confirming it opened correctly.

l3.rationale: Open the Edit mode from the Photos toolbar.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor onto the Edit control area.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Click the photo canvas to focus the image area.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor over the photo content area.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Open the Light Adjustments section to access brightness controls.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor to the brightness slider area.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Drag the brightness slider left/down to reduce brightness.

l4.rationale: Enter Photos editing controls and lower the photo brightness with the adjustment slider.

l5.rationale: This span opens editing controls and moves the slider, matching the task of turning the photo brightness down to -1.

l3.rationale: Reposition the cursor over the slider after adjusting it.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Click back on the photo image area in Photos.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor within the Photos window after the adjustment.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Click the displayed photo canvas again.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor across the Photos window while finishing the edit.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Save the edited image from the Photos menu.

l4.rationale: Review the adjusted photo and save the edited image to finalize the brightness change.

l5.rationale: The confirmation actions end with the Save menu item, indicating the brightness change is being committed to the image.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor near the Save menu item area.

l4.rationale: Move focus away after saving, including the return to File Explorer/Logger windows.

l5.rationale: The remaining navigation and window switch appear to leave the edit view and go back to the folder/list after saving.

l3.rationale: Click the Photos window background to refocus after saving.

l4.rationale: Move focus away after saving, including the return to File Explorer/Logger windows.

l5.rationale: The remaining navigation and window switch appear to leave the edit view and go back to the folder/list after saving.

l3.rationale: Move the cursor back over the Task 77 file item in Explorer.

l4.rationale: Move focus away after saving, including the return to File Explorer/Logger windows.

l5.rationale: The remaining navigation and window switch appear to leave the edit view and go back to the folder/list after saving.

l3.rationale: Switch focus to the Computer Use Logger window at the end.

l4.rationale: Move focus away after saving, including the return to File Explorer/Logger windows.

l5.rationale: The remaining navigation and window switch appear to leave the edit view and go back to the folder/list after saving.
